THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ON VERDICT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUM, THOMAS F. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORELLANA, WILLIAM A. ORTIZ, JOSE A GONZALEZ, MARCO A. $580,955.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $580,955.00
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, PARTIALLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUM, THOMAS F. AS TO DEFENDANT ORELLANA, WILLIAM A. ORTIZ, JOSE A GONZALEZ, MARCO A.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WILLIAM ORELLANA, JOSE ORTIZ, AND, MARCO GONZALEZ MOTION TO TAX COSTS. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION DENIED. PLAINTIFF MADE A VALID SECTION 998 OFFER TO SETTLE WITH DEFENDANT GONZALEZ THAT HE DID NOT ACCEPT. THE JUDGMENT RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF WAS MORE FAVORABLE THAN THE OFFER. DEFENDANT ORELLANA IS ONLY LIABLE FOR $15,000.00 AND THE REMAINING TWO DEFENDANTS ARE JOINTLY AND SEVERALLY LIABLE FOR $565,955.00. FORMUZI'S FEE REDUCED TO $4,225.00 AND SLOSAR FEE REDUCED TO $3,500.00. REQUEST FOR TRIAL COURIER COSTS OF $709.80, AND ATTORNEY TRANSPORTATION EXPENSES OF $235.50 WITHDRAWN. THE CHALLENGED $840.00 IS ALLOWABLE COURT REPORTER PER DIEM FEES. THE COURT ADOPTS PLAINTIFF'S PROPOSED ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO TAX COSTS
Off Calendar Aug-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT WILLIAM ORELLANA, JOSE ORTIZ, and, MARCO GONZALEZ MOTION TO TAX COSTS. Appearances: Peter Alfert, Esq. of Hinton & Alfert, (925) 932-6006, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Robin Y. Trembath, Esq. of Trembath, Deichler & Hermanson LLP (925) 600-0900, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied. Plaintiff made a valid section 998 offer to settle with defendant Gonzalez that he did not accept. The judgment received by plaintiff was more favorable than the offer. Defendant Orellana is only liable for $15,000.00 and the remaining two defendants are jointly and severally liable for $565,955.00. Formuzi's fee reduced to $4,225.00 and Slosar fee reduced to $3,500.00. Request for trial courier costs of $709.80, and attorney transportation expenses of $235.50 withdrawn. The challenged $840.00 is allowable court reporter per diem fees. The court adopts plaintiff's proposed order. Order signed in open Court. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
